query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) 
SELECT name, (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'AE'), 1 FROM (
  SELECT 'Dubai' as name UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Abu Dhabi' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Sharjah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Ajman' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Ras Al Khaimah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Fujairah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Umm Al Quwain' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Al Ain'
) AS cities_list
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);

  SELECT 'Sharjah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Ajman' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Ras Al Khaimah' UNION ALL
